title: Cleaning Up the Room 整理房间

lines.en: Lily, your room is very messy. Please clean it up.
lines.zh: 莉莉，你的房间很乱。请收拾一下。

lines.en: But Mom, I will do it later. I am busy now.
lines.zh: 但是妈妈，我等一下再做。我现在很忙。

lines.en: You said that yesterday. Please do it now.
lines.zh: 你昨天也这么说。请现在就做。

lines.en: First, put all the books on the shelf.
lines.zh: 首先，把所有的书放到书架上。

lines.en: Put your dirty clothes in the laundry basket.
lines.zh: 把脏衣服放到洗衣篮里。

lines.en: Should I make my bed too?
Yes. A clean room makes you feel happy.
lines.zh: 要的。干净的房间让人心情好。

lines.en: You are right. My room looks much better now!
lines.zh: 你说得对。我的房间现在看起来好多了！
